acid.name: Acid
acid.summary: Corrosive substances and dissolving effects deal acid damage.

bludgeoning.name: Bludgeoning
bludgeoning.summary: Blunt force such as hammers, falling, and constriction deals bludgeoning damage.

cold.name: Cold
cold.summary: Freezing or frigid effects deal cold damage.

fire.name: Fire
fire.summary: Flames and intense heat deal fire damage.

force.name: Force
force.summary: Pure magical energy in damaging form deals force damage.

lightning.name: Lightning
lightning.summary: Electrical bolts and similar effects deal lightning damage.

necrotic.name: Necrotic
necrotic.summary: Withering, deathly, or soul-draining effects deal necrotic damage.

piercing.name: Piercing
piercing.summary: Puncturing and impaling attacks deal piercing damage.

poison.name: Poison
poison.summary: Venom, toxins, and poisonous gas deal poison damage.

psychic.name: Psychic
psychic.summary: Mental assaults and psionic force deal psychic damage.

radiant.name: Radiant
radiant.summary: Holy or searing spirit-infused power deals radiant damage.

slashing.name: Slashing
slashing.summary: Cutting attacks from blades and claws deal slashing damage.

thunder.name: Thunder
thunder.summary: Concussive bursts of sound deal thunder damage.
